Title: Data Analyst
Description:
As a Data Analyst within the Asset Finance EPT (Empowered Product Team) you will play a key role in enabling a data-driven Originate-to-Distribute (OtD) business. Based in The Hague, you will support our Asset Finance professionals by ensuring that data is accurate, reliable, and translated into meaningful insights for both internal stakeholders and external investors. In this role, you will work at the intersection of business, data, and technology, contributing directly to the quality of our reporting, the robustness of our data chain, and the continuous improvement of our Asset Finance processes. Work is hybrid and the official location for this job is The Hague.







Responsibilities

You will conduct data analysis and delivery and support the functional support team’s day-to-day operations, including frequent meetings with users. Other responsibilities include:
Managing the applications.
Working towards team goals and supporting everyday processes and testing for colleagues in your Asset Finance team EPT.
Driving continuous improvements and process automation.
Executing Security Operations tasks to ensure that processes and applications are securely managed and in control.







Qualifications




Experience with data analysis (SQL, Excel, Power BI or similar tools).
Strong logical thinking and problem-solving skills, with the ability to break down complex issues into manageable components.
Affinity with financial data (e.g. loans, portfolios, cashflows).
A structured and methodical approach to analyzing data and identifying root causes.
Ability to communicate insights clearly to both technical and business stakeholders.
A proactive mindset with a focus on continuous improvement.
Fluent in English, Dutch is a preference.




Please note that for this role you need to be already situated in the Netherlands.




For more information, please contact Ritsa (ritsa.paraskevopoulou@experis.nl).

Title: Finance & Data Analyst
Description:
Somos un grupo de empresas en plena transformación financiera y buscamos a alguien que quiera crecer dentro de un proyecto real, con impacto desde el primer día.

Si tienes ganas de aprender, te orientas al dato y quieres dar el salto a cliente final, queremos conocerte.




¿Qué harás?

Dar soporte en la planificación financiera, presupuestos y forecasting del grupo.
Construir y mantener modelos financieros y cuadros de mando para apoyar la toma de decisiones.
Colaborar en el diseño y automatización del reporting financiero, incorporando herramientas de datos.
Analizar rentabilidad de proyectos internos.
Trabajar de forma transversal con distintas áreas del negocio.
Apoyar en el cumplimiento normativo, fiscal y coordinación de auditorías.




¿Qué buscamos?

Formación en Finanzas, ADE, Economía o similar, valorable.
Al menos 2 años de experiencia en entornos financieros. Se valorará positivamente experiencia en auditoría, aunque no es un requisito.
Manejo de herramientas de análisis y datos: Excel avanzado, Power BI o similares.
Más que el recorrido, buscamos actitud: alguien con ganas de aprender, proactividad y capacidad de entender el negocio más allá del número.




¿Qué ofrecemos?

Incorporación a un proyecto con recorrido real, en plena expansión, donde tendrás visibilidad y aprendizaje constante.
Acompañamiento y desarrollo dentro de un equipo financiero en pleno crecimiento.
Salario en el rango de 25.000€ – 30.000€ en función del perfil.
Oportunidades de formación continua.




Somos una empresa comprometida con la igualdad de oportunidades y la diversidad en el equipo.

Title: Data analyst
Description:
Dans le cadre de sa politique diversité et inclusion l’AGPM s'engage à étudier toutes les candidatures, à reconnaitre et à promouvoir tous les talents quels que soient leurs croyances, handicap, origine ethnique, sexe, orientation sexuelle, âge ou tout autre critère qui pourrait faire l'objet d'une discrimination.




Au sein de la Direction de l’Organisation des Systèmes d’Information (DOSI), le Pôle Data de la Division Architecture et Data a pour mission de garantir la qualité et la pertinence des données, essentielles pour éclairer les décisions stratégiques de l'entreprise.

Ce Pôle Data est composé de dix collaborateurs répartis au sein de trois services : Data Engineering, Data Usages et Data Gouvernance.

Le Data Analyst du service Data Usages agit en tant qu’assistance à maitrise d’ouvrage Data en traduisant les besoins métiers en spécifications fonctionnelles de données, puis en convertissant ces données complexes en tableaux de bord et recommandations d’aide à la décision pour les Directions Métiers.




A ce titre, les missions seront les suivantes :

· Animer des ateliers avec les utilisateurs finaux pour comprendre leurs problématiques

· Traduire les besoins business en spécifications fonctionnelles

· Définir les dictionnaires de données

· S’assurer de la fiabilité, de la cohérence et de la conformité des données sources

· Faire l'interface avec les data engineer pour le déploiement des flux de données

· Suivre le planning et les livrables du projet

· Extraire et explorer les données pour répondre à des questions ponctuelles

· Concevoir des tableaux de bord d'aide à la décision

· Réaliser les tests fonctionnels

· Rédiger la documentation utilisateur et accompagner les collaborateurs aux nouveaux outils.




Titulaire d’un diplôme de niveau Bac +5 en informatique, vous justifiez d’une expérience professionnelle d’au moins sept ans sur des fonctions similaires. Vous disposez de solides compétences techniques, notamment en gestion de projet AMOA, en requêtes SQL, en gestion de bases de données relationnelles et en SGBD. Vous êtes capable de créer des rapports et de visualisations des données avec Power BI ou Business Objects. La connaissance du langage Python est également requise. Une bonne compréhension du domaine de l’assurance et la capacité à challenger un besoin métier sont fortement appréciées.




Autonome, vous faites preuve d’un fort sens du service et du respect des engagements. Doté d’un bon esprit de synthèse, vous savez prendre du recul et vous remettre en question. Vous appréciez le travail en équipe et contribuez activement à une dynamique collective. Curieux(se), vous avez une forte appétence pour les nouvelles technologies liées à la data.




Ce poste offre l’opportunité d’intervenir sur des problématiques techniques riches et variées dans un contexte de transformation structurant, notamment dans le cadre des synergies entre différentes entités. Vous évoluerez dans un système d’information modernisé, bénéficiant d’expertises solides et de pratiques innovantes favorisant la performance et la montée en compétences continue.




Le poste peut être basé à Aix-en-Provence ou Toulon.




Ce poste est soumis à l’obtention d’une habilitation de sécurité délivrée par les autorités françaises.

Title: Senior Data Analyst
Description:
🚨 Senior Data Analyst | Fully Remote | Long-Term Contract 🚨

I'm currently supporting a global organisation on the search for a Senior Data Analyst to join a long-term data transformation programme.




📍 Fully Remote (Poland preferred, Czech Republic & UK considered)

📅 Indefinite

💻 B2B / Freelance




This is an excellent opportunity for a Senior Data Analyst who enjoys working at the intersection of business and technology. You'll be responsible for understanding business requirements, analysing complex datasets, designing data models, supporting data migration initiatives, and helping stakeholders turn data into actionable insights.




Key Responsibilities:

✔ Gather and document business and project requirements

✔ Analyse, profile and cleanse large datasets

✔ Design conceptual, logical and physical data models

✔ Create data mapping specifications for migration projects

✔ Coordinate UAT activities with business stakeholders

✔ Support Agile delivery teams using Jira or Azure DevOps

✔ Build dashboards and communicate insights through data storytelling

✔ Collaborate with both business and technical teams to deliver scalable data solutions




Key Skills Required:

✅ Data Analysis & Data Profiling

✅ Data Modelling (Conceptual, Logical & Physical)

✅ OLTP & OLAP Systems

✅ SQL (Advanced)

✅ Python (Pandas)

✅ Cloud Platforms

✅ Tableau, Power BI or Qlik

✅ Strong stakeholder management and communication skills




Experience within Insurance, Financial Services, or other enterprise-scale environments would be highly beneficial.




📩 If interested, please click apply

Title: Estágio | Data Analyst
Description:
QUEM SOMOS?




Uma das maiores seguradoras do mundo, temos como pilar a sustentabilidade e o cuidado com as pessoas. Possuímos um amplo portfólio de produtos e diversas unidades em que atuamos: Investimentos, Consórcios, Capitalização, Previdência e Vida Resgatável, Saúde, Seguros e Assistência.

Com presença em mais de 100 países nos cinco continentes, somamos mais de 34 mil colaboradores em todo o mundo, mais de 300 em Portugal.

Trabalhamos para construir o futuro e estamos comprometidos com a inovação.

Estamo-nos a transformar para acompanhar os nossos clientes também no mundo digital.

A Fundación MAPFRE, instituição sem fins lucrativos, é a nossa acionista maioritária, o que fortalece a nossa independência e estabilidade. Entre os nossos compromissos está a valorização e apoio à diversidade e inclusão, construindo ambientes mais acolhedores. A presença de mulheres em cargo de gestão e o equilíbrio racial e de género na constituição das equipas é a nossa prioridade.




Como estagiário(a) de Data Science farás parte da transformação data‑driven da Mapfre Portugal, contribuindo para a gestão dos dados como um ativo estratégico ao longo de todo o seu ciclo de vida. Integrarás uma equipa multidisciplinar, trabalhando de perto com engenharia de dados e desenvolvimento de projetos. O teu papel será apoiar a análise, exploração e modelação de dados, aprendendo a traduzir problemas de negócio em soluções analíticas com impacto real.

Valorizamos a tua curiosidade, vontade de aprender e capacidade de colaborar. Durante o estágio terás acompanhamento contínuo, contacto com casos de uso reais e oportunidade de desenvolver competências técnicas e de negócio.




👉O que Oferecemos:




Estamos a ampliar a nossa equipa. Procuramos jovens curiosos e com vontade de começar uma carreira numa atividade em que nunca paramos de aprender.

A Mapfre é feita de pessoas, por isso retribuímos da melhor maneira possível o comprometimento dos nossos Estagiários, que contam com:

Estágio de Duração 1 ano;
Remuneração fixa;
Carga de trabalho: 35h/semanais;
12 dias de férias ano;
Horário flexível;
Cursos e formações presenciais e Elearning na nossa plataforma digital, Universidade Corporativa MAPFRE. Lembrando que a MAPFRE é uma empresa global, o crescimento vai além das barreiras territoriais!
Integração numa equipa experiente e dinâmica;
Possibilidade de integrar o nosso programa de voluntariado.




👉 Perfil Pretendido:




Formação superior em Data Science/Analytics, Engenharia, Matemática, Estatística ou áreas similares (finalistas ou recém‑graduados).
Conhecimentos base de estatística, machine learning e inteligência artificial.
Experiência académica ou projetos pessoais em Python ou R (valorizado).
Noções de SQL ou SAS Guide (preferencial).
Interesse em ambientes Cloud (GCP, Azure ou AWS).
Conhecimentos de ferramentas de visualização como Power BI (valorizado).
Interesse pela indústria seguradora.
Boa capacidade de comunicação e vontade de aprender a explicar conceitos complexos de forma simples.
Espírito colaborativo, curiosidade e proatividade.
Interesse em metodologias Agile e trabalho em equipa.




👉 Principais Atividades:




Apoiar o desenvolvimento de modelos e soluções analíticas, desde o entendimento do problema até à avaliação dos resultados.
Colaborar com diferentes áreas de negócio, compreendendo processos e necessidades para apoiar a tomada de decisão baseada em dados.
Explorar e preparar dados de diversas fontes internas e externas, garantindo qualidade e consistência.
Contribuir para a criação de dashboards e análises, facilitando o acesso à informação por parte dos utilizadores.
Apoiar na definição de requisitos analíticos e técnicos, garantindo alinhamento com os objetivos de negócio.
Participar na avaliação do impacto dos casos de uso, nomeadamente em conversão, retenção e sinistralidade.
Aprender e aplicar boas práticas de ciência de dados, mantendo-te atualizado(a) sobre tendências, ferramentas e metodologias.

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
NES Fircroft are currently recruiting for a Systems Engineering Data Analyst for our client, who are a global, industry-leader in energy Technology




Data Analyst

Hybrid working: Office in Berlin

Duration: 2 year employment contract




The document and Systems Engineering Data Analyst is responsible for developing software tools needed to collect, process, analyze, and interpret data to support operational team decision-making.

The role involves transforming raw data into meaningful insights, preparing reports and dashboards, identifying trends, build automatized quality control tools and helping the organization improve performance through data-driven recommendations.




Key Responsibilities

Data Collection and Management

In charge to develop software tools to gather data from different contributors through multiple sources, including databases, spreadsheets, and business systems.
Clean, validate, control, and organize datasets for reporting and analysis purposes.
Maintain data records and support data governance practices.




Data Analysis

Analyze large datasets to identify trends, patterns, and anomalies.
Conduct analysis to measure quality of contributors before the release to the customer.
Support ad hoc analysis requests from different departments.




Reporting and Visualization

Develop and maintain regular reports, dashboards, and performance scorecards.
Present data in a clear and visually effective way using charts, tables, and dashboards.
Track key performance indicators (KPIs).




Continuous Improvement

Identify opportunities to improve reporting processes, data quality, and analytical methods.
Contribute to the development of data standards, templates, and best practices.




2.3.1 Required:

Data Analytics
Statistics
Computer Science




Appreciated:

Information Systems Management




2.4 Software

2.4.1 Required:

Excel / Google Sheets
SQL
Power BI / Tableau
Python or R




2.5 Languages

2.5.1 Required: English

Appreciated: German/French

2.6 Soft Skills

Strong Communication skills
Ability to perform and deliver in a challenging environment
Mobile for short duration business trip

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
eir business talent is looking to hire a Data Analyst for a 3-month contract position based in Dublin operating on a hybrid working model (2 days onsite per week)
 
The Data Analyst supports data migration initiatives by defining, validating and governing source-to-target data mappings between legacy systems and target platforms. The role ensures data quality, transformation logic and mapping readiness for ETL development, testing and deployment.

Key Responsibilities

Define and maintain source-to-target data mappings for all in-scope data objects
Analyse legacy system data structures and identify data quality issues, gaps, and inconsistencies
Gather and document target system data requirements in collaboration with stakeholders
Develop and maintain mapping workbooks across defined data domains
Define mapping logic including:direct field mappings,data transformations and business rules,lookup/reference value mappings,default values and calculated fields
Identify and resolve mapping issues such as missing fields, conflicting definitions, and unclear data ownership
Define data object dependencies and sequencing for migration (e.g., master data before transactional data)
Facilitate workshops with SMEs, vendors, and technical teams to validate mapping decisions
Maintain version control and change management for mapping documentation
Ensure all mappings are testable, auditable, and formally signed off
Provide input to ETL design, migration build, and testing planning
 Requirements

Strong data analysis and data profiling skills
Experience with data mapping, data migration, or ETL projects
Understanding of relational databases and data structures
Ability to define and document transformation logic and business rules
Proficiency in Excel (advanced mapping workbooks, lookup tables, data reconciliation)
Familiarity with data quality assessment and cleansing techniques
Exposure to ETL tools (e.g., Informatica, Talend, SSIS, or similar) – desirable
Business & Analytical Skills

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
Ability to interpret complex legacy data systems
Attention to detail with strong data accuracy focus
Ability to translate business requirements into technical mapping rules
Strong documentation and data governance awareness
Communication & Stakeholder Skills

Experience working with SMEs, IT teams, and vendors
Strong workshop facilitation and requirement gathering skills
Ability to manage ambiguity and conflicting data definitions
Strong written documentation and reporting skills
 
Candidates should hold appropriate RTWs for Ireland i.e. Stamp1G Spousal, Stamp 4, Irish/British/EU passport. 
For more information please apply here or contact harleen.tora@eirbusiness.ie

HTML:
eir business talent is looking to hire a Data Analyst for a 3-month contract position based in Dublin operating on a hybrid working model (2 days onsite per week)
 
The Data Analyst supports data migration initiatives by defining, validating and governing source-to-target data mappings between legacy systems and target platforms. The role ensures data quality, transformation logic and mapping readiness for ETL development, testing and deployment.

Key Responsibilities
  • Define and maintain source-to-target data mappings for all in-scope data objects
  • Analyse legacy system data structures and identify data quality issues, gaps, and inconsistencies
  • Gather and document target system data requirements in collaboration with stakeholders
  • Develop and maintain mapping workbooks across defined data domains
  • Define mapping logic including:direct field mappings,data transformations and business rules,lookup/reference value mappings,default values and calculated fields
  • Identify and resolve mapping issues such as missing fields, conflicting definitions, and unclear data ownership
  • Define data object dependencies and sequencing for migration (e.g., master data before transactional data)
  • Facilitate workshops with SMEs, vendors, and technical teams to validate mapping decisions
  • Maintain version control and change management for mapping documentation
  • Ensure all mappings are testable, auditable, and formally signed off
  • Provide input to ETL design, migration build, and testing planning
 Requirements
  • Strong data analysis and data profiling skills
  • Experience with data mapping, data migration, or ETL projects
  • Understanding of relational databases and data structures
  • Ability to define and document transformation logic and business rules
  • Proficiency in Excel (advanced mapping workbooks, lookup tables, data reconciliation)
  • Familiarity with data quality assessment and cleansing techniques
  • Exposure to ETL tools (e.g., Informatica, Talend, SSIS, or similar) – desirable
Business & Analytical Skills
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
  • Ability to interpret complex legacy data systems
  • Attention to detail with strong data accuracy focus
  • Ability to translate business requirements into technical mapping rules
  • Strong documentation and data governance awareness
Communication & Stakeholder Skills
  • Experience working with SMEs, IT teams, and vendors
  • Strong workshop facilitation and requirement gathering skills
  • Ability to manage ambiguity and conflicting data definitions
  • Strong written documentation and reporting skills
 
Candidates should hold appropriate RTWs for Ireland i.e. Stamp1G Spousal, Stamp 4, Irish/British/EU passport. 
For more information please apply here or contact harleen.tora@eirbusiness.ie

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
Key Responsibilities

Collect, clean, and analyze data from multiple sources.
Create dashboards and reports using tools such as Power BI, Tableau, or Excel.
Perform data validation and ensure data accuracy and integrity.
Identify trends, patterns, and business insights from data.
Generate daily, weekly, and monthly reports for management.
Work closely with cross-functional teams to understand business requirements.
Write SQL queries to extract and manipulate data.
Present analytical findings and recommendations to stakeholders.
Monitor key performance indicators (KPIs) and prepare performance reports.
Support business teams with ad hoc data analysis requests.

Required Skills

Strong knowledge of Microsoft Excel (Pivot Tables, VLOOKUP/XLOOKUP, Power Query).
Proficiency in SQL.
Experience with Power BI or Tableau.
Good understanding of data analysis and reporting.
Basic knowledge of Python or R is an added advantage.
Strong problem-solving and analytical skills.
Excellent communication and presentation skills.
Attention to detail and ability to meet deadlines.

Title: Business Data Analyst
Description:
En Volkswagen Group Services Barcelona estamos buscando un/ nuevo/a Compañero/a que dará soporte directo en análisis de datos de negocio al responsable de área. Proporcionará información estructurada, informes periódicos e insights relevantes sobre el rendimiento de los servicios. Su labor se centrará en el análisis de indicadores clave como enrollment, automatic service scheduling y la evolución de los servicios por mercado, país y modelo, así como en el mantenimiento de dashboards y herramientas de reporting en Power BI, asegurando la calidad, fiabilidad y disponibilidad de la información necesaria para la toma de decisiones del área.




Entre las funciones del puesto:

1. Soporte en el análisis de datos del servicio: Dar apoyo al responsable interno en el análisis de datos de servicios conectados (enrollment, automatic service scheduling, métricas de negocio adicionales, uso por mercado/modelo), facilitando la identificación de patrones y desviaciones relevantes.

2.Apoyo en la generación de insights accionables: Asistir al responsable interno en la extracción de conclusiones relevantes a partir de los datos, enfocadas en mejorar el negocio y la experiencia del cliente.

3. Apoyo en la definición y seguimiento de KPIs: Colaborar en la definición, mantenimiento y actualización de KPIs de segundo nivel orientados a negocio, asegurando consistencia de métricas.

4. Preparación de información para la toma de decisiones: Preparar y estructurar datos, informes y resúmenes ejecutivos como base para las decisiones del responsable del área.

5. Elaboración de informes periódicos y análisis puntuales: Ejecutar reportes recurrentes y análisis ad-hoc bajo demanda del responsable interno o de otros stakeholders del área.

6. Soporte en la gestión de Power BI y reporting: Mantener dashboards, modelos de datos y visualizaciones en Power BI bajo la dirección del responsable del área.

7. Apoyo en el control de calidad del dato: Colaborar en la revisión de fuentes de datos, identificación de inconsistencias y validación de resultados de reporting.

8. Coordinación con equipos técnicos y de datos: Alinear fuentes, definiciones de KPI y metodología con IT y equipos analíticos.

9. Preparación de presentaciones y documentación: Elaborar materiales de soporte para comités, reuniones y comunicaciones internas.




Qué esperamos de ti:

Grado universitario en Ingeniería Economía, Analítica de Datos o formación equivalente.
Valorable formación específica en gestión de proyectos data analytics o negocios digitales.
Valorable formación en Power BI y Business Intelligence (modelado de datos, DAX, visualización y gobierno del dato).
Análisis de datos, reporting avanzado o herramientas BI complementarias.
Mínimo 2 años en funciones de soporte analítico, reporting, gestión de datos o soporte operativo a áreas de negocio, preferiblemente en entornos digitales, tecnológicos o de automoción.
Inglés c1
Análisis e interpretación de datos orientados a negocio.
Definición y seguimiento de KPIs y métricas de rendimiento.
Gestión administrativa y presupuestaria básica (volúmenes, facturación, licencias).
Capacidad para estructurar información compleja y convertirla en reportes ejecutivos.
Coordinación en entornos transversales y trabajo colaborativo con múltiples áreas.
Ofimática avanzada: PowerPoint, Excel.
Business Intelligence y reporting: Power BI (nivel medio).
Gestión de trabajo y documentación: Confluence, Jira (valorable)
Conocimiento de metodologías de trabajo Agile (SAFe, Scrum)




Qué podemos ofrecerte:

Subvención diaria para la cantina.
Acceso gratuito a transporte de empresa.
Opción para participar en el Plan de Retribución Flexible, según la normativa interna de la empresa.
Acceso subvencionado a formación en idiomas.
Acceso a Plataforma de Formación E-learning.
Beneficios corporativos.
Descuentos en automóviles del grupo.
Hasta el 60% de teletrabajo

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
We’re looking for the special, unique and amazing YOU!

@ KCS IT, we look for the ones that stands out, for those that always wants to be better and fight for it, and for those who has the same values that we do: dedication, energy, integrity, transparency, flexibility, trust, honesty, hard work, proactivity, team work.

At KCS we stand for equality and value diversity. We create a safe, diverse environment where opportunities are equal for everyone! We do not discriminate based on age, ethnicity, sexual orientation, gender, disability or any factor other than merit. All applications with skills for the position are welcome!




We are looking for an Amazing: Data Analyst

Seniority: +4 years

Location : Lisbon/Porto




Skills Needed?




Degree in Computer Science, Statistics, Mathematics, Economics, or related fields.
Proven experience in data analysis and Power BI.
Proficiency in SQL and other data manipulation tools.
Ability to create interactive dashboards and reports in Power BI.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
Good communication skills to present insights clearly and effectively.
Ability to work independently and in a team.
The candidate has to be in Portugal.







Why should you become part of our family?




You can develop a career that fits you: your career development is personalized, taking in consideration your needs and goals from a short to long term
Interesting Challenges Ahead: you can work for several clients from different sectors of activity
Free training programs: Our training and certification programs in languages, tech, behavior and business will help you to reach your full potential faster
International projects in Benelux: you can gain international experience in Benelux and balance a new way of living with work
Type of projects (depending on the project you might find one of this types of projects):
In hybrid Systems: Is important to balance work with socialization, that´s why a hybrid system works for us and for you
Full Remote projects: If you want to work while you enjoy the comfort of your home
Full Onsite projects: if you prefere the company of your colleagues!
Take care of your well-being: Enjoy our free nutrition, psicologist, general medicine appointments and our yoga and personal training days… all remote!




Who are we?

Founded in 2008 and based in Lisbon, KCS IT is a consulting company in the field of Information Technology and Services, focused on creating value for our clients through three main areas: Consulting, Outsourcing, Inovation and Training. Our commitment to talent development is unmistakable in the recent opening of the Porto, Leiria and Azores hubs, which aims to develop technology for the national and international market. Since 2018 we have been elected one of the 10 major companies in the “Index of Excellence”, an initiative that aims to reward organizations that invest most in the development and satisfaction of their employees.We believe transparency, trust and integrity are the pillars of any business and relationship and that is what we promise our clients and employees who join our company KCS IT.

Title: Data & BI Analyst
Description:
Company Description

Inetum is a European leader in digital services. Inetum’s team of 28,000 consultants and specialists strive every day to make a digital impact for businesses, public sector entities and society. Inetum’s solutions aim at contributing to its clients’ performance and innovation as well as the common good. Present in 19 countries with a dense network of sites, Inetum partners with major software publishers to meet the challenges of digital transformation with proximity and flexibility. Driven by its ambition for growth and scale, Inetum generated sales of 2.5 billion euros in 2023.

Job Description


Creation of dashboards and reports to support decision-making.
Implementation of data visualization strategies.
Data Governance: asset cataloging, application of technical and functional rules.
Data Quality: execution of profiles and alerts for stakeholders.
Connections with Microsoft Fabric, Dynamics, and other sources.
Support to business teams in Purview, Data Governance, and Data Quality.
Onboarding and training


Qualifications


Between 2 and 5 years of experience in the role.
Experience in Data Governance and EDP projects.
Tools and platforms:
Microsoft Purview (implementation of data quality rules)
Microsoft Fabric
Power BI
Azure
Databricks
AWS
Languages and tools:
SQL
Advanced Excel
Dashboard tools
Desirable knowledge:
SAS Enterprise Guide
DOMO
DAMAn framework
Experience in CI/CD and agile methodologies.


Additional Information

Work model: Hybrid.

Title: Data Analyst H/F
Description:
Qui sommes-nous ?

Althéa est un cabinet de conseil spécialisé dans la transformation des fonctions RH, SIRH et Finance. Dans le cadre du développement de notre activité d'externalisation de la gestion de la maladie, nous renforçons nos équipes et recherchons un(e) Data Analyst pour accompagner notre croissance et contribuer à l'amélioration continue de nos services.




Votre mission :

Rattaché(e) au Responsable du service Externalisation de la Gestion de la Maladie, vous jouez un rôle clé dans l'exploitation, l'analyse et la valorisation des données afin d'accompagner la prise de décision et l'optimisation de nos processus.




À ce titre, vos principales missions seront :




-Collecter, centraliser et stocker les données.

-Contrôler et fiabiliser les données (détection des erreurs, doublons et données manquantes).

-Structurer et organiser les données pour faciliter leur exploitation.

-Réaliser des analyses et identifier des tendances.

-Concevoir des reportings et tableaux de bord à destination des équipes et des décideurs.

-Participer à l'amélioration continue des processus et outils.




Selon le profil et les appétences du candidat, le poste évoluera sur d’autres tâches:




-AMOA : en charge de retranscrire auprès de nos équipes de développement les améliorations à apporter à nos outils. Améliorations que vous aurez trouvées ou qui auront été remontées par les équipes.

-Conseil : prendre en charge des missions de conseil auprès de nos clients

-Management : gérer des équipes de production




Votre profil :




-Formation supérieure (Bac+5) en Audit, Finance ou en Data Management ou équivalent.

-Première expérience en analyse de données.

-Maîtrise d'Excel avancé et appétence pour les outils de traitement et de visualisation des données (Power BI, SQL, Python ou équivalent).

-Capacité d'analyse, rigueur et sens de l'organisation.

-Curiosité intellectuelle.

-Goût du challenge et de l'amélioration continue.

-Esprit d'analyse et de synthèse.

-Envie d'évoluer dans un environnement en forte croissance.




CE QUE NOUS APPORTONS !




Des valeurs et du sens à votre travail

Au-delà des avantages que proposent tous les cabinets du marché – tels que la flexibilité du travail, des missions enrichissantes, la mobilité géographique, des activités internes telles que des soirées/afterworks, une rémunération variable motivante, des formations, une mutuelle/prévoyance, une indemnité repas ou un restaurant d’entreprise, des RTT –




…nous souhaitons chez Althéa mettre en avant l'aspect le plus apprécié par nos collaborateurs : leur offrir un environnement de travail sain, exempt de politique interne et de rivalité entre associés. Les valeurs d’honnêteté, d’écoute et de transparence sont les piliers fondamentaux d’Althéa. Cette ambiance et ces principes sont ressentis et valorisés au quotidien par nos collaborateurs, leur offrant ainsi un cadre idéal pour donner du sens à leur travail et progresser de manière constante.




Voici deux exemples concrets de cette approche :

• Tout collaborateur a la possibilité de demander à participer au Codir ALTHEA ou au Codir de son pôle d’activité pour mieux comprendre la gouvernance et les processus décisionnels, et ainsi mieux appréhender la gestion du cabinet. Cette initiative est unique dans le monde du conseil.

• Chaque mois, nous organisons des "Meet&Tchat Consultants". Deux associés du cabinet convient entre 10 et 12 personnes à discuter en fin de journée autour d’un verre, dans un cadre chaleureux propice aux échanges. Ils répondent à toutes les interrogations sans tabou et avec une totale transparence. De même, des Meet&Tchat sont organisés spécifiquement pour les Managers, Senior Managers et Engagement Managers. Ces moments sont toujours très appréciés tant par nos collaborateurs que par les associés.




Rémunération : Entre 35K€ et 42 K€ en fixe selon expérience + Prime de performance+ Participation.

Au-delà des avantages que proposent tous les cabinets du marché – tels que la flexibilité du travail, des missions enrichissantes, la mobilité géographique, des activités internes telles que des soirées/afterworks, une rémunération variable motivante, des formations, une mutuelle/prévoyance, une indemnité repas ou un restaurant d’entreprise, des RTT –


…nous souhaitons chez Althéa mettre en avant l'aspect le plus apprécié par nos collaborateurs : leur offrir un environnement de travail sain, exempt de politique interne et de rivalité entre associés. Les valeurs d’honnêteté, d’écoute et de transparence sont les piliers fondamentaux d’Althéa. Cette ambiance et ces principes sont ressentis et valorisés au quotidien par nos collaborateurs, leur offrant ainsi un cadre idéal pour donner du sens à leur travail et progresser de manière constante.


Voici deux exemples concrets de cette approche :

• Tout collaborateur a la possibilité de demander à participer au Codir ALTHEA ou au Codir de son pôle d’activité pour mieux comprendre la gouvernance et les processus décisionnels, et ainsi mieux appréhender la gestion du cabinet. Cette initiative est unique dans le monde du conseil.

• Chaque mois, nous organisons des "Meet&Tchat Consultants". Deux associés du cabinet convient entre 10 et 12 personnes à discuter en fin de journée autour d’un verre, dans un cadre chaleureux propice aux échanges. Ils répondent à toutes les interrogations sans tabou et avec une totale transparence. De même, des Meet&Tchat sont organisés spécifiquement pour les Managers, Senior Managers et Engagement Managers. Ces moments sont toujours très appréciés tant par nos collaborateurs que par les associés.


Rémunération : Entre 35K€ et 42 K€ en fixe selon expérience + Prime de performance+ Participation.

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
Company

A leading organization dedicated to advancing research and innovation within the food and chemical industries. The company focuses on leveraging data and technology to drive meaningful insights and support sustainable growth.




Job Description

We are seeking a skilled Data Analyst to join our Research & Innovation team. The successful candidate will work with Python-based data transformations and applications, coordinating with IT and business teams to deliver value-driven data solutions. This role involves mapping, preparing, and transforming data to support analytics, dashboards, and application support, ensuring timely delivery across various stakeholders.




Responsibilities

Develop and pilot data processing solutions, transitioning successful projects to IT for scaling.
Create and maintain Python scripts for data transformation and preparation.
Support and adapt existing applications to meet evolving needs.
Collaborate with business stakeholders to structure and coordinate data mapping activities.
Translate business requirements into clear inputs for analytics and dashboard development.
Validate data and analytics solutions from a business perspective to ensure accuracy.
Manage project timelines, tracking deliverables to meet deadlines.
Engage with end-users to validate outputs and refine solutions collaboratively.
Maintain high standards of data quality and consistency across datasets.




Requirements

Strong Python skills, including experience with Pandas, NumPy, SciPy, and Streamlit.
Experience with data transformation and preparation workflows.
Basic understanding of statistical measures such as mean, standard deviation, and coefficient of variation.
Familiarity with GitHub or basic version control tools.
Ability to clearly structure and communicate data, analytics, and reporting requirements.
Organized with the ability to manage multiple tasks and stakeholders effectively.
Comfortable working in a business-facing role and collaborating with IT teams.
Pragmatic, solution-oriented, and focused on execution.
Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in a relevant technical, scientific, or business field.
Industry experience in food or chemicals is a plus.




Other Information

If you are interested and want to apply, please submit your application via the apply button below and contact me.

Title: Data Analyst Junior
Description:
Joining Unlimitail means becoming part of the Retail Media revolution — the marketing lever that is transforming advertising by leveraging data and the digital and physical environments of retailers.




With the ambition to become a leader in Europe and Latin America, Unlimitail helps brands deploy powerful Retail Media strategies and supports retailers in developing their own offers through cutting-edge proprietary technology.




At Unlimitail, you’ll be joining a fast-growing company at the crossroads of data, technological innovation, and digital marketing — reinventing the way brands and retailers connect with consumers.




Role Overview :




Within the Analytics team, your mission will be to participate in the development of Unlimitail’s analytics capabilities. Your environment will be millions of transactional data coming from major retailers on the market to analyze and improve the performance of online and offline marketing campaigns.




As we work with both retailers (providing media inventory) and brands (buying media inventory), you will have the opportunity to gain a deep understanding of the retail media ecosystem.




Your Mission :




You will work with different teams (Ad Operations, Marketing, Sales) in different countries on a wide variety of topics:

Perform ecommerce campaigns analysis to provide detailed insights
Conduct end-to-end ad hoc analysis to help retailers best monetize their inventory
Participate in the design and maintenance of databases, using SQL to store and manage data efficiently
Work on automating data analysis and data visualization capabilities
Work on Unlimitail’s customer lifetime value calculation capability
Participate in the development of new, cutting-edge capabilities to create the best retail media products




What we’re looking for :




Master's degree in Data Analysis, business analytics, Computer Science, Statistics, Mathematics, Engineering, or a related field.
First experience in data analysis
Data Analysis: Proven ability to analyze large datasets, identify trends, and extract actionable insights through the use of strong SQL skills for querying and data extraction.
Programming Languages: Python and SQL mandatory, any other is a plus
Data Visualization: previous experience in creating interactive and insightful visualizations, using tools like Looker is mandatory
Knowledge of GCP environment is a plus
Problem-solving: Adept in approaching analytical problems and proposing effective solutions.
Good communication skills in English. Another language (Spanish, Portuguese) is a plus.
Strong team player with the ability to collaborate effectively




Salary range: €40k - €45k (commensurate with profile)




What’s in it for you :




Work in a fast-paced, international, and innovative environment, at the intersection of data, retail, and media – one of the fastest-growing spaces in digital
A strategic role in a high-growth team with autonomy and impact
A dynamic, supportive environment with smart people and bold ambitions
Office located in the heart of Paris (Sentier district)
A flexible remote work policy of 2 days/week
90% reimbursement of public transportation
10€/day Swile card for each working day, we'll cover 60% of the cost




Ready to make a big impact? Apply now and be part of our innovative journey!

Unlimitail is committed to fostering a diverse workforce and strongly encourages applications from underrepresented groups. We are committed to equality of opportunity and welcome applications from individuals, regardless of their background.

If you have any reasonable adjustment needs arising from a disability or medical condition to fully participate in the recruitment process, please discuss this with the recruiter who contacts you.

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
Decskill was founded in 2014 as an IT Consulting Company and their main mission is to delivery value through the knowledge. We enable companies to meet the chalenges of digital world by providing our clients with business models that ensure technological capacity, flexibility and agility. We are more than 500 consultants with offices in Lisbon, Porto and Madrid.




DECSKILL operates in 3 main areas:

• DECSKILL TALENT: through which we provide our clients with an extension to their IT teams;

• DECSKILL BOOST: through which we provide our client with software development models to increase capacity and optimize Time-to-Market, where we create and manage teams that deliver according to their needs, at the desired speed;

• DECSKILL CONNECT: through which we provide our client with consulting services, as well as the implementation and management of information technology infrastructures.




Our practice results in the creation of value for our customers, either by delivering qualified and value-added services, or through highly qualified and motivated professionals, as well as technology solutions that allow us to operate and transform the business of our customers.




We are looking for a DATA ANALYST.




Responsabilities:

As a Data Analyst, you will play a vital role in our team. Working directly with one or more of the bank's business areas, you will provide valuable insights to drive business growth, understading their needs, proposing and implementing data-driven solutions (analysis, visualization and automation). You will exercise a lot of problem identification and problem solving skills.
You will have the opportunity to take ownership of business essential analytical projects that involve retrieving, preparing and analysing complex datasets using data/statistical models and best practices in data visualization for the reporting creation, with the goal to produce insights and automated tools that will guide strategic solutions
You will move between technical and non-technical areas and should be able to communicate well with different types of professionals. It is very important to be able to clearly and concisely understand stekeholders’ needs and translate these to our technical team, as well as present the results of complex analysis to our stakeholders.




Requierments:

Academic background in Engineering, Economics, Computing, Mathematics, Statistics or related fields
Professional experience in any data visualization tool such as Tableau or Power BI
Professional experience in data analysis with programming, preferably Python (Pandas)
Professional experience in any data visualization tool such as Tableau or Power BI
Professional experience in data analysis with programming, preferably Python (Pandas)
Ability to analysze, synthetize and simplify.
Knowledge of descriptive statistics and hypothesis testing is a plus.
Knowledge in Big Data technology such as Pyspark, Presto and Airflow is a plus
Knowledge of Power Query and DAX is a plus




If you’re interested in this job please send your CV in English to carolina.mustra@decskill.com with reference “CM/Data Analyst".




Decskill is committed to equality and non-discrimination with all our talents. We recruit and promote talent, based on diversity and inclusion, regardless of age, gender, ethnicity, race, nationality or any other form of discrimination incompatible with the dignity of the human being.

Title: Analista de datos
Description:
Únete a CGI!

Fundada en 1976, CGI se encuentra entre las mayores empresas de servicios de consultoría TI y de negocio del mundo. Nos basamos en conocimientos y resultados para ayudar a acelerar la transformación digital de nuestros clientes. A través de 21 sectores en 400 ubicaciones en todo el mundo, nuestros 94.000 profesionales proporcionan servicios de consultoría TI y de negocio integrales, escalables y sostenibles que entregamos localmente.




Buscamos a alguien un perfil de Analista de Datos para trabajar en un proyecto de un cliente del sector financiero.




Que estamos buscando

1-3 años de experiencia en Análisis de datos
Experiencia trabajando con Databricks, Python, Power BI y SQL.




Together, as owners, let’s turn meaningful insights into action.

Life at CGI is rooted in ownership, teamwork, respect and belonging. Here, you’ll reach your full potential because…

You are invited to be an owner from day 1 as we work together to bring our Dream to life. That’s why we call ourselves CGI Partners rather than employees. We benefit from our collective success and actively shape our company’s strategy and direction.

Your work creates value. You’ll develop innovative solutions and build relationships with teammates and clients while accessing global capabilities to scale your ideas, embrace new opportunities, and benefit from expansive industry and technology expertise.

You’ll shape your career by joining a company built to grow and last. You’ll be supported by leaders who care about your health and well-being and provide you with opportunities to deepen your skills and broaden your horizons.

Come join our team—one of the largest IT and business consulting services firms in the world.

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
Position Snapshot

Permanent

Location: Linda-a-Velha

Company: Nestlé Nespresso

Full-time / Hybrid mode

Position Summary

Nestlé Nespresso is currently looking for an Ecommerce Data Analyst. You will be responsible for leveraging multiple data sources and analytics solutions to deliver insights on digital and eCommerce performance, supporting growth and decision-making across the market.

A Day in the Life of an Ecommerce Data Analyst


Analyse digital and eCommerce performance across channels and identify growth opportunities
Ensure data quality, governance, and accuracy across all digital assets
Develop and maintain dashboards and reports for operational and executive use
Execute performance analysis aligned with business objectives
Identify insights and provide actionable recommendations to stakeholders
Support sales forecasting and business cases development for commercial initiatives
Provide data and analytical support to empower Activation and Experience teams
Collaborate with cross-functional teams (Marketing, CRM, Sales, IT, Finance)
Promote data literacy and a data-driven decision mindset within the organization


What Will Make You Successful…


Strong analytical and statistical skills with ability to translate data into business insights
Experience in digital/eCommerce analytics (3+ years preferred)
Proficiency in analytics tools (e.g., Google Analytics, Power BI, Google Data Studio; SQL and BigQuery as a plus)
Experience with A/B testing, reporting, and data visualization
Knowledge of AdTech and MarTech solutions
Strong communication skills to simplify complex information for non-experts
Ability to manage multiple stakeholders and priorities in a fast-paced environment
Fluent in English


What we offer


Career development opportunities
Flexible and hybrid working environment
Competitive salary and benefits
Health insurance and wellbeing initiatives

Title: EXPLORE - Data Analyst (H/F) - CDI
Place: Carquefou, Pays de la Loire, France
Description:
Data Analyst (H/F)

CDI

Rejoignez le Groupe INTESCIA, leader de la Business Intelligence en Europe !

Qui sommes-nous ?

EXPLORE, filiale d’INTESCIA GROUP, est un acteur leader dans le développement de solutions de data intelligence BtoB. Nous produisons des données à forte valeur ajoutée pour accompagner le développement commercial des entreprises, faciliter leurs analyses de marchés et optimiser leur connaissance clients. Nous comptons aujourd’hui plus de 1 500 clients et près de 35 000 utilisateurs dans les univers de l’Immobilier, la Construction, l’Énergie, l’Environnement et des Services à l’entreprise.

Nos atouts ?


Un groupe en pleine expansion, reconnu pour son expertise et ses solutions à forte valeur ajoutée.
Une culture d’innovation, où la créativité et l’amélioration continue sont au cœur de notre ADN.
Des équipes passionnées et engagées, évoluant dans un environnement stimulant et collaboratif.



Votre mission :

Au cœur de la donnée, vous contribuez à transformer l’information en insights stratégiques pour Explore et ses clients. Vous participez activement à la création de valeur à travers des analyses pertinentes, des outils décisionnels performants et des données fiables.

Vos activités :


Réaliser des études ad hoc (dimensionnement de marché, potentiel commercial, analyses sectorielles…) pour Explore et ses clients
Produire des baromètres, indicateurs marché et extractions de données qualifiées
Interroger, structurer et exploiter les bases de données via SQL
Concevoir, développer et optimiser des tableaux de bord (Power BI)
Automatiser les traitements et flux de données (Python, FME)
Créer et suivre des indicateurs de performance pertinents
Rédiger et maintenir la documentation méthodologique
Contrôler et garantir la qualité des données
Identifier des opportunités d’enrichissement en croisant différentes sources de données



Le profil que nous recherchons :

Vous êtes à la fois analytique, curieux(se) et orienté(e) solutions. Vous aimez comprendre les enjeux métiers et transformer des données complexes en outils utiles et impactants.

Vos compétences :


Maîtrise des bases de données et des systèmes de gestion (MS SQL Server)
Solides compétences en data visualisation (Power BI)
Bonnes connaissances en programmation (Python apprécié)
Capacité à analyser, structurer et synthétiser l’information
Esprit d’initiative et force de proposition
Rigueur, organisation et sens du détail
Bonne compréhension des enjeux clients et appétence pour la data



Expérience :

Une première expérience en analyse de données, business intelligence ou gestion de bases de données est appréciée.

Ce que nous vous offrons :


Situé à Carquefou, dans le cadre paisible et verdoyant du quartier de la Fleuriaye, à quelques pas de l’Erdre (Port-Jean), vous profiterez d’un cadre idéal pour allier productivité et bien-être.
Type de contrat : CDI
Rémunération fixe
Horaires flexibles : forfait jours - afin de respecter votre équilibre entre vie professionnelle et personnelle.
Organisation hybride : Télétravail possible plusieurs jours par semaine.
Home office possible uniquement pour les candidats résidant à plus de 100 km de nos locaux.
Carte tickets restaurant, épargne d’entreprise, prime vacances, et des bornes de recharge pour véhicules électriques à disposition.
Frigo connecté, rempli quotidiennement pour vos pauses, et un cadre de travail aménagé en flex-office.

  • Rigueur, organisation et sens du détail
  • Bonne compréhension des enjeux clients et appétence pour la data


Expérience :

Une première expérience en analyse de données, business intelligence ou gestion de bases de données est appréciée.

Ce que nous vous offrons :

  • Situé à Carquefou, dans le cadre paisible et verdoyant du quartier de la Fleuriaye, à quelques pas de l’Erdre (Port-Jean), vous profiterez d’un cadre idéal pour allier productivité et bien-être.
  • Type de contrat : CDI
  • Rémunération fixe
  • Horaires flexibles : forfait jours - afin de respecter votre équilibre entre vie professionnelle et personnelle.
  • Organisation hybride : Télétravail possible plusieurs jours par semaine.
  • Home office possible uniquement pour les candidats résidant à plus de 100 km de nos locaux.
  • Carte tickets restaurant, épargne d’entreprise, prime vacances, et des bornes de recharge pour véhicules électriques à disposition.
  • Frigo connecté, rempli quotidiennement pour vos pauses, et un cadre de travail aménagé en flex-office.

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
Data Analyst




We are looking for a Data Analyst to join our Inetum Team and be part of a work culture focused on innovation!




Location: Lisbon or Porto




Main Tasks:

Work directly with one or more business areas of the bank, providing valuable data-driven insights to drive business growth by understanding stakeholder needs and proposing and implementing analytical solutions (analysis, visualisation, and automation).
Take ownership of business-critical analytical projects involving the retrieval, preparation, and analysis of complex datasets using data and statistical models, producing insights and automated tools to guide strategic decision-making.
Build and maintain reports and dashboards using best practices in data visualisation, delivering final products through Tableau, Power BI, APIs, and chatbots.
Move fluidly between technical and non-technical environments, clearly translating stakeholder needs to the technical team and communicating complex analysis results to business sponsors, sales, and traders.
Contribute to data processing activities including data feed industrialisation, ETL, data warehousing, and data visualisation.




Profile:

Academic background in Engineering, Economics, Computing, Mathematics, Statistics, or a related field.
Professional experience in data analysis with programming, preferably Python (Pandas).
Professional experience with data visualisation tools such as Tableau or Power BI.
Strong ability to analyse, synthesise, and simplify complex information for diverse audiences.
Knowledge of descriptive statistics and hypothesis testing is a plus.
Knowledge of Big Data technologies such as PySpark, Presto, and Airflow is a plus.
Knowledge of Power Query and DAX is a plus.
Strong problem identification and problem-solving skills with a proactive mindset.




Language Skills:

Fluent in English (required).




Additional Information:

Hybrid work regime – office in Lisbon or Porto.
Integration into the Quantitative Data Intelligence (QDI) team, working in direct contact with Global Markets front office including business sponsors, sales, and traders.
Exposure to a wide data ecosystem covering ETL, data warehousing, and modern visualisation and automation technologies.
Opportunities for professional growth and development.
Collaborative and innovative work environment.




📩 Send your CV & join our team!

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
Data Analyst

32–40 hours per week | On-site, Malta 

 

Bits Malta Ltd is looking for a commercially-minded, curious Data Analyst; someone who doesn’t just produce charts, but turns data into decisions. An honest admission: our previous Data Analyst delivered many beautiful dashboards. But dashboards don't change a business. Insights do.

 

We're looking for someone who reads every number with the question: "So what?"

 

What you'll do

Own our data warehouse. It's the place where signals surface, and action begins.
Deliver a weekly strategic scorecard to the executive team, with your interpretation and recommendations.
Translate patterns in player behaviour, marketing, compliance and cost into concrete improvements.
Proactively flag what the organisation is missing.
Support marketing, product, customer service and compliance with analyses that actually lead to action.

 

You're strong in

SQL (required), Python or R, Power BI or Tableau, and expert-level Excel.
Commercial thinking. You see data as input for decisions, not as an end in itself.
Working independently, juggling multiple questions in parallel, and owning projects from question to decision.
Excellent English, both verbal and written.
Online gambling / iGaming experience and familiarity with AML / Responsible Gambling is a strong plus.

 

What we offer

Direct exposure to executive decision-making. Your work is seen and used.
International environment in a fast-growing, regulated sector.
Room for autonomy and development.
Competitive salary, strong benefits, private health insurance and performance bonus.
Relocation support for candidates moving to Malta.

 

Screening filter

In your motivation, include one concrete example of an analysis that actually changed a business decision. Without this example, we won't consider your application.

 

Selection process

Introductory interview covering background and motivation.
Data case. You receive an anonymised dataset, formulate three commercial insights with recommendations, and present them in 15 minutes to the management team.
Final interview with the executive team.

 

Practical

On-site position at our Malta office.
Bits Malta Ltd provides operational, compliance and customer service facilitation within the online gambling sector.

 

No agency recruitment, please.

#DataAnalyst #iGaming #Malta #Hiring #BusinessIntelligence #PowerBI #SQL #ResponsibleGambling

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
Company Description

Inetum is a European leader in digital services. Inetum’s team of 28,000 consultants and specialists strive every day to make a digital impact for businesses, public sector entities and society. Inetum’s solutions aim at contributing to its clients’ performance and innovation as well as the common good. Present in 19 countries with a dense network of sites, Inetum partners with major software publishers to meet the challenges of digital transformation with proximity and flexibility. Driven by its ambition for growth and scale, Inetum generated sales of 2.5 billion euros in 2023.

Job Description

Job Description:

The Data Analyst is responsible for collecting, cleaning, analyzing, and interpreting data to provide actionable insights for business decisions. The role involves creating and managing data pipelines using Airflow for data extraction, processing, and loading, ensuring their maintenance, monitoring, and stability. The analyst will work closely with end-users and other teams to provide accessible and reliable data

Main Tasks


Responsible for creating data pipelines in Airflow for data extracting, processing and loading
Responsible for code and query optimization
Responsible for generating insights and identify trends, anomalies or opportunities to improve users experience and anticipate their daily tasks
Responsible for delivering data in useful and appealing ways to users
Responsible for understanding business change and requirement needs, assess the impact and the cost.


Qualifications

Technical Skills:


Python
Experience in creating APIs in Python
PySpark
SQL, Oracle Data Base
Experience with Data Warehouses
Apache Airflow - Experience in pipeline development
Git
Agile methodologies


Language Skills


English – Practice


Soft Skills


Good communication skills
Strong analytical abilities, able to have the right synthesis and all possible details at same timee required soft skills
Adaptability skills
Team spirit
Client Focus

Title: Data Analyst (Product)
Description:
About Revolut

People deserve more from their money. More visibility, more control, and more freedom. Since 2015, Revolut has been on a mission to deliver just that. Our powerhouse of products — including spending, saving, investing, exchanging, travelling, and more — help our 75+ million customers get more from their money every day.

As we continue our lightning-fast growth,‌ 2 things are essential to our success: our people and our culture. In recognition of our outstanding employee experience, we've been certified as a Great Place to Work™. So far, we have 13,000+ people working around the world, from our offices and remotely, to help us achieve our mission. And we're looking for more brilliant people. People who love building great products, redefining success, and turning the complexity of a chaotic world into the simplicity of a beautiful solution.

About The Role

Our Data Science team solves complex problems with smart, practical solutions. Data Analysts and Scientists ‌work directly with product teams to uncover insights, guide decisions, and improve how customers experience Revolut. They do this by delivering smart, scalable solutions that move the business forward.

We’re looking for a talented Data Analyst to dig into our complex databases, look for root causes of a problem, design your own solutions, and write your own code to implement them. We aim for you to never stop learning, picking up new skills and delivering value along the way.

Up to shape what's next in finance? Let's get in touch.

What You’ll Be Doing


Understanding our business and its processes through our data
Applying this understanding and knowledge of data to help product and service teams
Designing key metrics to measure different aspects of the business
Creating and maintaining new aggregated views and tables to simplify data querying
Maintaining and creating new dashboards to track metrics and visualise insights
Promoting data literacy across the company, organising and holding workshops


What You'll Need


Previous experience in an analytical role, creating impactful solutions
A background/education in a quantitative discipline
5+ years of experience with SQL
Great skills with Python or other programming languages
Evidence of solid mathematical and statistics knowledge


Building a global financial super app isn’t enough. Our Revoluters are a priority, and that’s why in 2021 we launched our inaugural D&I Framework, designed to help us thrive and grow everyday. We're not just doing this because it's the right thing to do. We’re doing it because we know that seeking out diverse talent and creating an inclusive workplace is the way to create exceptional, innovative products and services for our customers. That’s why we encourage applications from people with diverse backgrounds and experiences to join this multicultural, hard-working team.

Important notice for candidates:

Job scams are on the rise. Please keep these guidelines in mind when applying for any open roles.


Only apply through official Revolut channels. We don’t use any third-party services or platforms for our recruitment.
Always double-check the emails you receive. Make sure all communications are being done through official Revolut emails, with an @revolut.com domain.


We won't ask for payment or personal financial information during the hiring process. If anyone does ask you for this, it’s a scam. Report it immediately.

By submitting this application, I confirm that all the information given by me in this application for employment and any additional documents attached hereto are true to the best of my knowledge and that I have not wilfully suppressed any material fact. I confirm I have disclosed if applicable any previous employment with Revolut. I accept that if any of the information given by me in this application is in any way false or incorrect, my application may be rejected, any offer of employment may be withdrawn or my employment with Revolut may be terminated summarily or I may be dismissed. By submitting this application, I agree that my personal data will be processed in accordance with Revolut's Candidate Privacy Notice

Title: DATA ANALYST POWER BI (F/H)
Description:
Novencia accompagne ses clients dans leurs projets de transformation digitale, technologique et data.

Expert en Data et Intelligence Artificielle nous aidons nos clients à exploiter et valoriser leurs données sous toutes ses formes en les accompagnant sur des projets de Data Gourvernance, Data Architecture, Data Science, et Data Engineering.







Vos principales missions sont les suivantes :




Collecter, structurer et analyser des données issues de diverses sources
Concevoir et optimiser des tableaux de bord interactifs sur Power BI
Assurer la qualité, la fiabilité et la cohérence des données utilisées
Collaborer étroitement avec les équipes métiers, les Data Engineers et les Data Scientists pour comprendre les différents besoins et proposer des solutions adaptées
Contribuer à l’amélioration des processus de data management
Participer à l’optimisation et à l’automatisation des flux de données, notamment via des processus ETL




Profil recherché :

Vous disposez d'un diplôme de Master ou d'école d'ingénieur et avez 5 à 8 ans d’expérience en tant que consultant confirmé ou senior sur :

Analyse de données
Power BI pour la visualisation et l’exploration des données (Maîtrise avancée)
SSAS, SSRS et SSIS (si possible sur MS Azure)
Une bonne connaissance de Python
Des problématiques liées à la DataViz
SQL et bases de données relationnelles
Une expérience en environnement Cloud est un +




Soft skills :

Excellent sens de la communication
Capacité à collaborer avec des équipes pluridisciplinaires, interface métiers

Autonomie, curiosité, esprit d’équipe

  • Capacité à collaborer avec des équipes pluridisciplinaires, interface métiers

Autonomie, curiosité, esprit d’équipe

Title: Data Analyst
HTML:
A Job? Or a Lifetime Experience? Start Yours Here!


A nossa missão é ser uma parte significativa da carreira das nossas pessoas. À medida que crescemos, cresce também a determinação em oferecer a melhor experiência aos nossos colaboradores e clientes e é exatamente isso que nos move. Somos uma empresa portuguesa de consultoria tecnológica com escritórios em Lisboa, Porto e Óbidos e representações no Brasil e Tunísia. Contamos com mais de 11 anos de expertise no mercado, e hoje somos um universo de cerca de 400 pessoas a trabalhar em contexto presencial, remoto ou híbrido em projetos em mais de 20 países.

Acreditamos que grandes pessoas fazem empresas de sucesso e por isso mesmo defendemos a valorização, reconhecimento e crescimento dos nossos profissionais.

Não queremos ser mais uma linha do teu CV, queremos que connosco vivas uma Lifetime Experience. Apostamos em formações e certificações que confirmam a tua real progressão, na promoção de um saudável work-life balance e na oferta de benefícios com impacto na tua vida pessoal e carreira.



O que procuramos

  • Licenciatura em Economia, Estatística, Matemática, Gestão ou similar;
  • Mais de 3 anos de experiência profissional em funções como Data Analyst;
  • Conhecimentos sólidos de SQL Server;
  • Conhecimentos sólidos de PowerBI (dashboards, DAX, modelagem de dados);
  • Conhecimentos sólidos de SSIS
  • Desenvolver, executar e automatizar processos ETL
  • Bons conhecimentos de inglês (B2 ou superior).



Ser Affinity

#Affinidade – Criares relações de proximidade e empatia com colegas, clientes e candidatos (e não apenas com tecnologias, linguagens e plataformas). Espírito de equipa e boa disposição;

· #Ambição – Quereres fazer mais e melhor. Vontade de exceder expectativas e evoluir pessoal e profissionalmente;

· #Ação – Energia para fazer acontecer. Mostrares proatividade e capacidade de iniciativa;

· #Aprendizagem – Vontade de evoluir individual e coletivamente e tornares-te um expert no mercado tecnológico;

· #Assertividade – Comunicação transparente e honesta, sempre com feedback construtivo.



A tua #LifetimeExperience

  • Participar em projetos nacionais e internacionais numa empresa baseada em relacionamentos pessoais, na simplicidade e na eficiência, com uma ação disruptiva no mercado tecnológico;
  • Aceder a um plano de carreira e formação personalizado e diretamente proporcional ao teu desempenho e interesse;
  • Fazer parte de um ambiente acolhedor, de confiança, respeito e informalidade;
  • Integrar as nossas Affinity Communities (de desporto, tecnologia, hobbies, etc.) e participar ativamente em projetos de responsabilidade social e ambiental;
  • Tirar partido de um conjunto de benefícios, parcerias, descontos eventos e dinâmicas internas.


Para além da tua satisfação profissional queremos proporcionar-te oportunidades de lazer e convívio memoráveis e dignos de uma experiência Affinity.

Join the Experience!


Envia-nos a tua candidatura e aproveita para nos conhecer e ir acompanhando em:

https://www.instagram.com/affinityportugal/

https://www.linkedin.com/company/2701281/admin/

  • https://twitter.com/WithAffinity

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
Senior Data Analyst (Power BI)

Location: Remote (EU Time Zones)

Role Type: B2B Long Term Contract




We're looking for a Senior Data Analyst with strong Power BI expertise to join a large-scale data and analytics programme.




You'll be responsible for developing dashboards and semantic models, gathering reporting requirements, and supporting the adoption of Power BI and Microsoft Fabric across the business. Strong communication skills are essential, as you'll work closely with stakeholders to deliver reporting solutions and promote best practices.




Key Skills & Experience

Strong commercial experience with Power BI
DAX, Power Query and Semantic Models
Advanced SQL and data modelling skills
Experience with Microsoft Fabric (preferred)
Strong stakeholder management and requirements gathering
Experience delivering self-service BI solutions
Excellent communication and problem-solving skills




Desirable

Azure Data Factory, Databricks, dbt or Azure Synapse
Experience with data governance or analytics enablement
Retail or e-commerce experience




This is an excellent opportunity to work on a high-impact analytics programme, helping shape a modern data environment.

Title: Data Analyst Junior
Description:
Somos un grupo de data marketing francés líder en Europa y cotizado en la bolsa de París, buscamos un Data Analyst Junior, en dependencia directa de la Dirección de Producto, se encargará de llevar a cabo una función de análisis de datos (cuantitativo y cualitativo- Business Intelligence), apoyando la toma de decisiones y asegurando la eficiencia operativa en la gestión de las campañas confiadas por los clientes. Si ello te apasiona y quieres unirte a nuestro equipo en Madrid y compartir nuestros valores fundamentales: el espíritu de conquista, la colaboración y el respeto. Inscríbete en la oferta, ¡¡te esperamos!! 😉




🎯 ¿Cómo contribuyes a cumplir nuestros objetivos y misión?

Desarrollando consultas con bases de datos (BigQuery, o Postgres), para hacer llegar los resultados de esas queries a los usuarios (bien en ficheros, o bien configurando y administrando nuestra herramienta de visualización de datos, Google LookerStudio).
Proponiendo desarrollos y redactando requisitos funcionales para aquellos casos en que un desarrollo en nuestras aplicaciones mejoraría nuestra eficiencia o productividad.
Manteniendo actualizada toda la documentación, para que en caso de ausencia cualquier otra persona pueda retomar cualquiera de los trabajos anteriores
Análisis pormenorizado de campañas, con la presentación y posterior puesta en marcha de una propuesta de valor a nuestro cliente en base a las conclusiones del mismo.
Búsqueda y análisis de factores que potencien la retención del cliente en base a las características de las campaña.
Proponer soluciones creativas/novedosas a necesidades preexistentes o nuevas del cliente en base a la detección de una necesidad mediante el análisis de datos y con el objetivo de diferenciar a Dékuple en el mercado.
Contribuir con nuevas metodologías de análisis de datos y presentación de resultados, siguiendo el principio de que sean comprensibles para cualquier miembro de la firma.




👤Perfil que necesitamos

Grado universitario en Informática, Telecomunicaciones, Estadística o similares, con especialidad en áreas relacionadas con Business Intelligence.
Experiencia de al menos 1-2 años en funciones similares
Conocimientos en SQL y Bases de Datos: Experiencia en la creación de queries SQL para extracción y manipulación de datos en bases de datos relacionales (como PostgreSQL o MySQL).
Experiencia en Herramientas de Visualización de Datos: Dominio de Looker Studio (o similar como Tableau, Power BI) para la creación de dashboards e informes visuales.
Capacidad de Análisis y Resolución de Problemas: Habilidad para analizar datos, identificar patrones, tendencias y proponer insights relevantes.
Conocimientos Básicos de Modelado de Datos: Entendimiento básico sobre modelos de datos y diseño de estructuras de datos eficientes.
Manejo de Hojas de Cálculo Avanzado: Habilidad para manejar Excel o Google Sheets a nivel avanzado, incluyendo el uso de fórmulas, tablas dinámicas y gráficos.
Se valorará positivamente el dominio del inglés.
Importante capacidad y visión sistémica.
Trabajo en equipo y colaboración con otros departamentos.




🎁 ¿Qué te ofrecemos?

Flexibilidad laboral: Disfrutarás de nuestra política Flexiwork, con teletrabajo dos días a la semana y tres en la oficina, además de 4 semanas completas de teletrabajo adicionales al año.
Seguro médico: Incluido como parte de la retribución flexible, con una exención fiscal del 100%.
Descuento en parking: Para que tu llegada a la oficina sea más cómoda, ofrecemos un descuento del 50% en el parking del edificio.




📍Ubicación:

Nuestras oficinas están en Madrid capital, en la calle Rufino González (zona metro Suanzes).




🌈 ¿Te atreves?

En Dékuple, buscamos la diversidad y por eso nuestros procesos de selección garantizan la no exclusión ni discriminación de ningún perfil. Te vas a encontrar un gran ambiente de trabajo y lo cuidamos mucho, por eso es importante que compartas nuestros valores y momento vital.
Si te interesa unirte a nuestro equipo, ¡te estamos esperando!
Envía tu CV a talento@dekuple.es y comienza tu próximo reto con nosotros.

Title: Addetto/a allo sportello per hub trasporti
Description:
Prende forma una nuova occasione nel mondo dei trasporti: nel nostro team cerchiamo un/una Addetto/a allo sportello che diventi il primo punto di contatto per autisti, clienti e fornitori. Ritmo operativo, informazioni chiare, zero attese inutili. Insieme costruiremo un’accoglienza di sportello ordinata e concreta.

Ti occuperai di accoglienza allo sportello, verifica documenti di trasporto (DDT e CMR) e consegna badge di carico/scarico. Gestirai prenotazioni ritiro/consegna su gestionale, aggiornando le pratiche e monitorando le tempistiche giornaliere. Controllerai incassi allo sportello per servizi accessori, con registrazione cassa e distinta di fine turno. Collaborerai con il magazzino per lo smistamento corsie e con l’ufficio traffico per eventuali anomalie su spedizioni.

Offerta e benefit:


tempo pieno con contratto a tempo determinato (CCNL Logistica/Trasporti)
Retribuzione lorda mensile indicativa: 1.480-1.780 €
Buoni pasto
Formazione continua su procedure, DDT digitali e gestionale WMS
Orario flessibile su turni diurni; start nelle prossime settimane


Requisiti:


diploma di scuola secondaria di secondo grado
dimestichezza con PC e gestione di pratiche digitali; uso base Excel/posta
precisione su documenti e numeri di spedizione; attitudine al contatto con il pubblico
gradito patentino carrelli o conoscenza base flussi magazzino (non obbligatorio)


Siamo pronti ad affiancarti sul campo. Lavoro pratico, responsabilità visibile, supporto del team.

Sede di lavoro: Sant'Angelo Lodigiano

Title: Data Analist
Description:
Jouw dagelijkse uitdagingen


Verzamelt en structureert data uit verschillende bronnen om bruikbare informatie te creëren.
Analyseert datasets om trends, patronen en inzichten te ontdekken die de organisatie helpen verbeteren.
Maakt rapportages en dashboards om resultaten helder en inzichtelijk te presenteren.
Ondersteunt teams en management met data-gedreven inzichten voor besluitvorming.
Controleert en bewaakt de kwaliteit en betrouwbaarheid van data.
Werkt samen met verschillende afdelingen om informatiebehoeften goed te begrijpen.
Draagt bij aan het verbeteren van processen door het gebruik van data en analyses.


Voordelen


Balans werk-privé: Geniet van flexibele werktijden en 25 vakantiedagen om werk en privé perfect te combineren
Continue professionele ontwikkeling: Verbeter jezelf met persoonlijke en professionele ontwikkelingsmogelijkheden
Betekenisvol werk: Je werk heeft een echte impact en draagt bij aan een positieve verandering in de wereld
Diversiteit en inclusie: Werk in een internationaal team uit 48 landen en voel je welkom en gewaardeerd door ons
Afwisseling: Je projecten zijn toekomstgericht en inspirerend, we bieden je een breed scala aan sectoren en projecten


Jouw Profiel


Minimaal HBO-werk- en denkniveau.
Ervaring met data-analyse en rapportages.
Kennis van Excel en bij voorkeur BI-tools zoals Power BI of Tableau.
Analytisch sterk en in staat om data om te zetten naar inzichten.
Goede communicatieve vaardigheden.
Goede beheersing van de Nederlandse taal.
Salarisindicatie: Afhankelijk van jouw ervaring en kennis betreft de salarisindicatie 3500 tot 6500 euro.


Over ons

Als internationale technologiepartner voor engineering & IT is Excellence jouw naar inspirerende projecten waarin jij het verschil maakt. We werken in 6 verschillende industrieën voor zowel wereldwijde bedrijven als wereldmarktleiders van middelgrote bedrijven in moderne plannings- en ontwikkelingsprojecten. Ons diverse team van meer dan 270 collega‘s komt uit 48 landen en is verenigd in ons enthousiasme voor technologie en duurzaamheid. Onze missie is "Engineers, save the earth!" en onze groene technologiebanen creëren duurzaamheid - Join Excellence!

Solliciteer nu voor deze baan of stuur ons een open sollicitatie op onze website excellence.ag.

Ben jij degene die wij zoeken? Solliciteer nu!
